/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/run_tests.dir/tests/test_parsing.cpp.o CMakeFiles/run_tests.dir/tests/test_general_rules.cpp.o CMakeFiles/run_tests.dir/tests/test_hashing.cpp.o CMakeFiles/run_tests.dir/tests/test_validation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/run_tests.dir/tests/godSpecific/test_apollo.cpp.o CMakeFiles/run_tests.dir/tests/godSpecific/test_artemis.cpp.o CMakeFiles/run_tests.dir/tests/godSpecific/test_athena.cpp.o CMakeFiles/run_tests.dir/tests/godSpecific/test_atlas.cpp.o CMakeFiles/run_tests.dir/tests/godSpecific/test_demeter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/run_tests.dir/tests/godSpecific/test_hephaestus.cpp.o CMakeFiles/run_tests.dir/tests/godSpecific/test_hermes.cpp.o CMakeFiles/run_tests.dir/tests/godSpecific/test_minotaur.cpp.o CMakeFiles/run_tests.dir/tests/godSpecific/test_pan.cpp.o CMakeFiles/run_tests.dir/tests/godSpecific/test_prometheus.cpp.o CMakeFiles/run_tests.dir/tests/test_unmake_move_tests.cpp.o CMakeFiles/run_tests.dir/tests/test_transposition_table.cpp.o CMakeFiles/run_tests.dir/tests/test_evaluation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/run_tests.dir/tests/test_climber_quiet.cpp.o -o run_tests  lib/libgtest_main.a libsantorini_engine.a lib/libgtest.a
